result.summary: Implemented database layer: BudgetEntity, BudgetDao, Migrations.kt (MIGRATION_1_2), modified TransactionEntity and RecurringTransactionEntity with budgetId FK, added budget-scoped query variants to both DAOs, bumped BudgetDatabase to v2.
